title: Legion protocol worker bundle manifest schema
description: Standalone validator for the v9 worker bundle manifest. The same shape is referenced inline by task-run.schema.json so bundle manifests can be validated without a full task-run payload.

id.description: Stable worker bundle ID. Lowercase slug form, e.g. 'implementer'.

version.description: Major.minor.patch schema version without leading zeroes.

role.description: Functional worker role slug. Must match a known v9 default role.

domain.description: Domain slug the bundle specializes in (e.g. 'protocol-core', 'workflow-orchestration').

capabilities.description: Capability slugs the bundle grants. Must be non-empty and unique within the bundle.

instructionsHash.description: Lowercase SHA-256 of the rendered prompt content, with sha256: prefix.

requiredSections.description: Heading slugs that must appear in the rendered prompt content.

forbiddenSections.description: Heading slugs that must NOT appear in the rendered prompt content.

domainPacks.description: Optional list of workflow-common-* pack IDs the bundle depends on. Each must exist on disk and be at pack_version >= 1.0.0 with pack_status 'extracted'.

promptFile.description: Filename of the bundle's prompt content Markdown file inside the bundles/ directory.
